commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a launcher stdout/stderr flush plus final exit after completed CLI entrypoint handling, awaits the root version fast path, updates launcher/version tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue gives concrete Windows npm commands and timing/process evidence, and current main source shows completed short-lived CLI paths can return to the launcher without a final shutdown; I did not execute the Windows smoke in this read-only review.
